form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. At the latest run favourite; raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 2.5 len at Ararat Bm56 March 30 over 2206m defeating Flashlight carrying 61kg at $2.15. The start before that favourite; won by 4.5 len at Terang Bm62 March 17 over 2156m on a rain affected track defeating What A Cross with 66kg at $2.80. Shapes as a top three prospect.

Can improve on the latest effort and is expected to be in the finish.
